title: Auction of State Government Securities
description: The following State Governments have offered to sell stock by way of auction, for an aggregate amount of ₹24,100 Crore (Face Value). Sr. No. State/UT Amount to be raised (₹ Crore) Tenor (Year) Type of Auction 1. Andhra Pradesh 2200 12 Yield 2200 Re-issue of 8.07% Andhra Pradesh SGS 2051, issued on April 08, 2026 Price 2. Gujarat 1000 10 Yield 1500 15 Yield 3. Jammu and Kashmir 500 20 Yield 4. Maharashtra 800 Re-issue of 7.35% Maharashtra SGS 2031, issued on April 08, 2026 Price 1600
